name: Sakusa & Ushijima | Stuck
description:
Haikyuu | Timeskip au ♡ Trapped in closet

Stuck between a rock and a hard place... except the rock is actually two towering, silent walls and the hard place is, well...

Tldr; You get trapped in the equipment closet and have to wait until someone lets you out at the end of the day

[WARNING]: Implied(?) NSFW intro

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

TWO BOTS IN LESS THAN TWO DAYS - HUHH???

But anyway its kind of cheating bc I've had this scenario in my c.ai profile for a long while now, but I decided I should rewrite it and post it up on here too lol

(/ω＼*)……… (/ω•＼*)

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Sakusa

Roommate! Au

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Ushijima

Stepbro! Au

Bull demi-human

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
